title: Understanding Net Force
text: The net force on an object is the total force acting on it. If there are no other external forces, the net force is due to gravity alone.

title: Calculate Gravitational Force
text: The gravitational force can be calculated using the formula: $$force=mass acceleration_{due,to,gravity}$$.

title: Substitute Values
text: Substitute the given values into the formula: $$mass=10.0$$ kg and $$acceleration_{due,to,gravity}=9.80$$ $$\frac{m}{s^2}$$.
